name: Huidong Lin
summary: Climate, sustainable trade, and policy research professional with experience across international nonprofit, technology, and public information platforms. Focused on green trade policy, carbon market developments, cross-border sustainability initiatives, and stakeholder engagement. Experienced in preparing policy briefs, market intelligence, executive materials, and research outputs for government, business, research, and media audiences.

experience.title: Specialist, Sustainable Trade
bullets: Supported sustainable trade initiatives focused on climate policy, green supply chains, carbon markets, and cross-border low-carbon transition topics.
Prepared policy research, market updates, and briefing materials for internal teams and external stakeholders.
Tracked developments in green trade, carbon border measures, voluntary carbon markets, and related regulatory discussions.
Coordinated meetings, project timelines, and knowledge products across policy, business, and research partners.

experience.title: Public Policy Intern
bullets: Monitored technology policy, platform governance, digital economy, and international regulatory developments to support public policy research and internal briefings.
Prepared issue summaries, stakeholder maps, and comparative research notes for policy, communications, and business teams.

experience.title: Research Assistant
bullets: Supported research, editing, and publication workflows for Belt and Road policy, trade, investment, and international cooperation content.
Supported expert network coordination and stakeholder consultations with government agencies, enterprises, research institutions, and media partners.

education.degree: Master of International Public Policy; completed alongside full-time professional work

education.school: University of International Business and Economics

skills.skills: Climate policy research; green trade; carbon markets; public policy analysis; stakeholder engagement; market intelligence; briefing materials; Microsoft Office Suite; Excel-based data analysis; Asana
